util Directory Reference(3) Library Functions Manual util Directory Reference(3)

NAME

util Directory Reference

SYNOPSIS

Files


file aspect_ratio.h
📐 Aspect Ratio Calculation Functions file atomic.h
file bits.h
🔢 Bit Manipulation Utilities file bytes.h
🔢 Byte-Level Access and Arithmetic Utilities file display.h
🖥️ Display Width and Terminal Centering Utilities file endian.h
🔄 Network byte order conversion helpers file env.h
Environment variable utilities with stack-based prompt responses. file fnv1a.h
#️⃣ FNV-1a Hash Function Implementation file format.h
📊 String Formatting Utilities file fps.h
⏱️ FPS tracking utility for monitoring frame throughput across all threads file image.h
🖼️ Safe overflow-checked buffer size calculations for images and video frames file ip.h
🌍 IP Address Parsing and Formatting Utilities file lifecycle.h
Lock-free module lifecycle state machine using pure stdatomic. file magic.h
Magic number validation constants and macros. file math.h
🔢 Mathematical Utility Functions file number.h
🔢 Number Formatting and Conversion Utilities file overflow.h
✅ Safe Integer Arithmetic and Overflow Detection file parsing.h
🔍 Safe Parsing Utilities file password.h
Password prompting utilities with secure input and formatting. file path.h
📂 Path Manipulation Utilities file pcre2.h
🔍 Centralized PCRE2 singleton pattern for efficient regex compilation file string.h
🔤 String Manipulation and Shell Escaping Utilities file thread.h
🧵 Thread lifecycle management helpers file time.h
⏱️ High-precision timing utilities using sokol_time.h and uthash file url.h
🌐 Production-Grade URL Validation and Parsing file utf8.h
🔤 UTF-8 Encoding and Decoding Utilities file util.h
🛠️ Master Utility Header file validation.h
Common validation macros to reduce duplication in protocol handlers.
